raw_consumer_statement: I notified Best Buy ( Citibank ) on XX/XX/XXXX, That I had charges were not minds. They stated that they closed that card and sent a replacement. XXXX years I started receiving statement where purchases were make under the old closed credit card. I called several time to let them know that I did not make these charges Starting XX/XX/XXXX. I requested that just closed all cards They issue a refund of {$590.00} but continue to let charges go through. Which ending up for over {$2000.00}. That send me documentation of someone using to card to book hotels and these. Last month I called again, they suggested that I go file a police report. I was told that to much time has laps for them to do anything. New charges continue to appeared as recent as XX/XX/XXXX, on closed accounts. They sent me information where a new was open account wrong email wrong telephone, I understand best buy or Citibank, they owe me money!!! l have all my receipts. They sent me a check for XXXX but calling saying I still owe over {$500.00}. I have been paying trying not to let my credit go bad. Am XXXX XXXX XXXX and don't understand why am responsible for something not mines!!!!! I need help to resolve this and get all the money I paid back.
